summary: Completed comprehensive testing of InvoicePush new customization features. All 10 requested features tested successfully. Backend APIs 100% functional (25/25 tests passed). Frontend UI working perfectly with new Customize dropdown, template picker, logo upload, terms & conditions, custom fields, and PDF generation with all customizations.
passed_tests: Customize dropdown button shows all 5 options (Change Template, Edit Template, Update Logo & Address, Manage Custom Fields, Terms & Conditions)
Template picker modal shows 3 template previews (Standard, Modern, Spreadsheet)
Template selection persists after save (tested modern and spreadsheet templates)
Logo upload modal works with file input and preview
Terms & Conditions modal works with textarea and save functionality
Custom Fields modal - add/remove fields with label and value inputs
PDF download with Standard template functionality triggered
PDF includes logo if uploaded (base64 logo saved to user profile)
PDF shows OVERDUE ribbon for overdue invoices (INV-001 marked as OVERDUE)
All existing invoice CRUD still works (create, read, update, delete, status changes)
Invoice creation with customer selection, item selection, due date, tax, and notes
Backend customization APIs (invoice_template, invoice_logo, invoice_terms, invoice_custom_fields)
Authentication with session token works correctly
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Customers, Items, Invoices, Settings)
Currency formatting with ₹ symbol throughout the application
Status badges display correctly (DRAFT, SENT, OVERDUE, PAID)
Reminder generation and approval queue functionality

success_percentage.backend: 100% (25/25 API tests passed including new customization endpoints)
